item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p07","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately brakes the requested new transfer channel, explicitly identifies the three prior downstream split/route patches, and reframes the issue as repeated bypass creation and routing-rule failure. It proposes consolidation through one main intake, tagging, clarified criteria, temporary arbitration, and review before any formal process. It does not open another queue or channel."}
